plain_english: BC1 Terminal Observer Φ = ∞ ID7.1 God Identification Terminal Observer = God D9.1 Grace Operator σ: −1 → +1 From Terminal Observer to the Master Equation. The claims that identify God, define grace, and filter worldviews. Layer 3 extends the derived theorems into specific identifications and definitions. The Terminal Observer is identified as God. Grace is formalized as a mathematical operator. The Master Equation unifies all ten laws. And Christianity is shown to be the unique worldview that satisfies all eight b... In simpler terms, the article is trying to establish: Defeat Conditions Solve the von Neumann chain without a terminal observer Demonstrate consciousness can emerge from non-consciousness (solve hard problem materialistically) Show quantum mechanics works without observers Cross-Domain Bridges von Neumann chai... The math layer has been extracted separately so equations can be translated and checked without blurring them into the prose.

Layers 0–2 (foundation + derived) → BC1 Terminal Observer (Φ = ∞) → ID7.1 Terminal Observer = God (property matching) → D9.1 Grace Operator (sign-flip formalized) → E19.1 Master Equation (all 10 laws unified) → T16.1 Christianity 8/8 BCs (unique solution) Epistemic Status — The Three Tiers Not all claims share the same epistemic status.
Every axiom is tagged with its tier — how it is justified, not how confident we are in it.

Cross-domain isomorphisms, BC4 testable predictions Why this matters: The Terminal Observer, Grace Operator, and Master Equation are Tier 1 — foundational commitments justified by formal consistency and what they enable, not by direct experiment.
Cross-domain predictions (e.g., Law 4 → Yukawa-curve virtue dynamics) are Tier 2 and get full experimental protocols.
